statement: Agents with user-invocable: false that are not referenced in any reachable agent's agents: field are invisible dead code. VS Code builds the available-agents list by following the dependency chain from user-invocable roots. An agent file that exists on disk but is unreachable through the chain can never be invoked — by the user or by any other agent.
publicSummary: Discovered 5 agent files on disk that were all user-invocable: false with no parent agent referencing them. They appeared in directory listings but were completely invisible to VS Code's agent picker and subagent invocation. Making the root agent user-invocable and wiring subagents via the agents: field resolved the issue.
cautionNotes: This applies to VS Code agent discovery as of early 2026. The discovery mechanism may evolve.
